summary: PART I Introduction Granite Construction Company was incorporated in 1922. In 1990, Granite Construction Incorporated was formed as the holding company for Granite Construction Company and its wholly-owned and consolidated subsidiaries and was incorporated in Delaware. Unless otherwise indicated, the terms we, us, our, Company and Granite refer to Granite Construction Incorporated and its wholly-owned and consolidated subsidiaries.
